title: Automating Database Schema Generation
scenario: Generate a SQL script to create a table schema for storing company employee information. The table should have columns for employee ID, name, email, department, and job title. Assume the employee ID is of type INT, name and job title are of type VARCHAR, email and department are of type VARCHAR with a maximum length of 255.
constraints: Must have a PRIMARY KEY constraint on the employee ID column

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated SQL syntax is valid and follows the standard SQL syntax rules.
Verify if the generated table schema matches the requirements specified in the scenario.
Check if the PRIMARY KEY constraint is correctly applied to the employee ID column.
